'''famuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharfland|wharfland]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharfland|wharfland]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| famuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmizhith|fæmizhith]] || [[word:fæmizhij|fæmizhij]] || [[word:fæmizhish|fæmizhish]] || [[word:fæmizhi|fæmizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:famumuzhuth|famumuzhuth]] || [[word:famumuzhuj|famumuzhuj]] || [[word:famumuzhush|famumuzhush]] || [[word:famumuzhu|famumuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:famuzhuth|famuzhuth]] || [[word:famuzhuj|famuzhuj]] || [[word:famuzhush|famuzhush]] || [[word:famuzhu|famuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:famufzhuth|famufzhuth]] || [[word:famufzhuj|famufzhuj]] || [[word:famufzhush|famufzhush]] || [[word:famufzhuf|famufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famuzhuthu|famuzhuthu]] || [[word:famuzhuju|famuzhuju]] || [[word:famuzhushu|famuzhushu]] || [[word:famuzhuku|famuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famuzhuth|famuzhuth]] || [[word:famuzhuj|famuzhuj]] || [[word:famuzhush|famuzhush]] || [[word:famuzhu|famuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famuzhuthul|famuzhuthul]] || [[word:famuzhujul|famuzhujul]] || [[word:famuzhushul|famuzhushul]] || [[word:famuzhukul|famuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famuzhuthuthu|famuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:famuzhujuju|famuzhujuju]] || [[word:famuzhushushu|famuzhushushu]] || [[word:famuzhuku|famuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famuzhuthun|famuzhuthun]] || [[word:famuzhujun|famuzhujun]] || [[word:famuzhushun|famuzhushun]] || [[word:famuzhukun|famuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famuzhuthuoro|famuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:famuzhujuoro|famuzhujuoro]] || [[word:famuzhushuoro|famuzhushuoro]] || [[word:famuzhukuoro|famuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
